Crafted with a timeless design and featuring your very own signature, these shades are the ultimate symbol of confidence and sophistication. Whether you’re exploring the Roblox world or making a statement in-game, the Zerkiouz 2nd Signature Shades ensures you stand out with class and style.

items.name: Sharp Looking Hat - the Gear
items.description: It's not just sharp looking. It's actually sharp! Throw this hat at opponents to do damage with its razor sharp edges.  Don't worry about getting it back - it magically appears back on your head after it hits something.

items.name: Exploding Arrow Crimson Crossbow
items.description: This crimson crossbow fires an arrow that sticks to the first thing it hits and explodes after about 2 seconds. The explosion deals between 10 and 110 damage based on how long the arrow was flying through the air.

items.name: The Modern Top Hat
items.description: The Modern Top Hat is a stylish accessory that seamlessly blends traditional sophistication with contemporary flair. Crafted from high-quality materials, its sleek design features a streamlined silhouette and a subtle yet eye-catching embellishment. Whether worn for formal occasions or as a fashion statement, this timeless piece elevates any ensemble, making a bold and refined statement in modern fashion.
